creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
For example:
> $ cd /usr/ports/games/abstreet && distilator 
> -p not supported
> "rust/crates" not supported
> && not supported
> -o not supported
> rust/crates/ahash-0.2.18.tar.gz not supported
> -o not supported
> "rust/crates" not supported
> && not supported
> -o not supported
> rust/crates/autocfg-0.1.7.tar.gz not supported
> mkdir not supported
> -p not supported
> "rust/crates" not supported
> ...
